headline: Man's 'I Don't Need Therapy' Has Become The Reason Everyone Around Him Needs Therapy
summary: His friends have started a group chat called 'Jake's Intervention Preparation Committee.'
fullBody: Jake Denial insists he doesn't need therapy. His friends disagree. 'He cried for 3 hours because his sandwich was cut wrong,' one friend reported. Jake's ex-girlfriend is now in therapy 'to process the sandwich incident.' His coworkers have started a 'Jake venting session' every Friday. Jake remains 'fine.' The sandwich has been memorialized in a group chat sticker. Jake is not in the group chat.
